name: Red Crow Mysteries: Legion
short_description: A dark hidden-object puzzle adventure with dozens of scenes and puzzles. Your special gift allows you to see beyond the veil of reality — but that gift comes at a price. The Legion is waiting. Are you ready to face it?
detailed_description:
Step into the shadows of Red Crow Mysteries: Legion, a dark hidden-object adventure filled with puzzles, mystery, and supernatural secrets.

Your special gift allows you to see beyond the veil of reality — but that gift comes at a price. The Legion is waiting. Are you ready to face it?

And as you step outside, just to learn that nothing is the same anymore, you will search for clues, investigate surroundings, explore many different locations and seeks for helpful hidden objects and items. But beware, a man in a fine suite and with the friendly smile is not who he truly is.


🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Dozens of locations & mini-games – mystery lurks from every dark corner.

🗺️ Map & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Full voiceovers & HD visuals – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge: Casual, Adventure, and Challenging difficulty modes. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • INVESTIGATE strange occurrences

  • EXPLORE dozens of unique eerie locations

  • FIND clues and items

  • SEARCH for helpful hidden objects

  • CONFRONT the Legion and save your soul

  • SOLVE many different mini-games

  • EARN achievements

  • 3 DIFFICULTY MODES: casual, adventure, challenging

  • TUTORIAL for beginners

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
